queries.question: For all online news platforms containing the letter t, list the platform name and content management system.
queries.sql: SELECT platform_name, system_name FROM Online_News_Platform JOIN Content_Management_System ON Online_News_Platform.cms_id = Content_Management_System.id WHERE platform_name LIKE '%t%'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?platform_name ?system_name WHERE {
  ?online_news_platform a :Online_News_Platform .
  ?content_management_system a :ContentManagementSystems .
  ?online_news_platform p:hasContent_Management_System ?content_management_system .
  ?online_news_platform p:platform_name ?platform_name .
  ?content_management_system p:system_name ?system_name .
  ?online_news_platform p:platform_name ?platform_name_lk .
  FILTER(REGEX(STR(?platform_name_lk), "^.*t.*$", "i"))
}

queries.question: For all online news platforms containing the letter t, list the platform name and web framework.
queries.sql: SELECT platform_name, framework_name FROM Online_News_Platform JOIN Web_Framework ON Online_News_Platform.web_framework_id = Web_Framework.id WHERE platform_name LIKE '%t%'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?platform_name ?framework_name WHERE {
  ?online_news_platform a :Online_News_Platform .
  ?web_framework a :Web_Framework .
  ?online_news_platform p:hasWeb_Framework ?web_framework .
  ?online_news_platform p:platform_name ?platform_name .
  ?web_framework p:framework_name ?framework_name .
  ?online_news_platform p:platform_name ?platform_name_lk .
  FILTER(REGEX(STR(?platform_name_lk), "^.*t.*$", "i"))
}

queries.question: For all online news platforms containing the letter t, list the platform name, content management system, and web framework.
queries.sql: SELECT platform_name, system_name, framework_name FROM Online_News_Platform JOIN Content_Management_System ON Online_News_Platform.cms_id = Content_Management_System.id join Web_Framework on online_news_platform.web_framework_id = Web_Framework.id WHERE platform_name LIKE '%t%'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?platform_name ?system_name ?framework_name WHERE {
  ?online_news_platform a :Online_News_Platform .
  ?content_management_system a :ContentManagementSystems .
  ?online_news_platform p:hasContent_Management_System ?content_management_system .
  ?web_framework a :Web_Framework .
  ?online_news_platform p:hasWeb_Framework ?web_framework .
  ?online_news_platform p:platform_name ?platform_name .
  ?content_management_system p:system_name ?system_name .
  ?web_framework p:framework_name ?framework_name .
  ?online_news_platform p:platform_name ?platform_name_lk .
  FILTER(REGEX(STR(?platform_name_lk), "^.*t.*$", "i"))
}

queries.question: Show the web framework used by the Tech Today online platform.
queries.sql: Select framework_name from Web_Framework join online_news_platform on online_news_platform.web_framework_id = Web_Framework.id where platform_name = 'Tech Today'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?framework_name WHERE {
  ?web_framework a :Web_Framework .
  ?online_news_platform a :Online_News_Platform .
  ?online_news_platform p:hasWeb_Framework ?web_framework .
  ?web_framework p:framework_name ?framework_name .
  ?online_news_platform p:platform_name ?platform_name_f .
  FILTER(STR(?platform_name_f) = "Tech Today")
}

}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show me the platform name and technology for all online news platforms containing the letter t
Show me the technology used by the Tech Today online platform
